text: I feel the cool hush of a modern building, my senses gently tugged between curiosity and a strange detachment. The reflective glass before me hints at boundaries—spaces within spaces. There is a sense of anticipation as I move closer toward the illuminated wall of ideas and innovation, a place where curiosity seems welcome. Yet, I also sense how easy it is to become just another observer, not fully a part of this carefully curated world.
